query:
UPDATE island_guides SET featured = 1, display_order = CASE 
  WHEN name = 'Maafushi' THEN 1
  WHEN name = 'Hulhumale' THEN 2
  WHEN name = 'Dhiffushi' THEN 3
  WHEN name = 'Biyadoo' THEN 4
  WHEN name = 'Alimatha' THEN 5
  ELSE display_order
END
WHERE name IN ('Maafushi', 'Hulhumale', 'Dhiffushi', 'Biyadoo', 'Alimatha')
